# Cancel an Order

To cancel an order at Acme Shop, users must act quickly, as cancellations are only possible before the order is processed for shipping, typically within one to two hours after placement. Users can initiate a cancellation by logging into their account, going to the "My Orders" section, and selecting the order to cancel if the "Cancel Order" option is available. If the order has already shipped, cancellation is not possible, but returns can be initiated upon delivery. Special conditions apply to perishable items and personalized products regarding cancellations and returns.

[Source: order_management.md#cancel-an-order]
